 - Content: It's a formal letter regarding a draft letter to the Basler Rheinschiffahrt Aktiengesellschaft (Basel Rhine Shipping Company). The writer discusses whether to send the letter to the company or have the exhibition committee write it. The board of the shipping company has approved the draft in their meeting on June 25th.
